result.stdout:
Description:
  Parses SemGuS problem files.

Usage:
  semgus-parser [<inputs>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <inputs>  Files to read SemGuS problems from, or `-` to read from standard input. [default: -]

Options:
  --mode <Batch|Stream>         Mode to process inputs in. [default: Stream]
  --format <Json|Sexpr|Verify>  Output format. [default: Verify]
  --output <output>             File to write output to. Outputs to standard out if not specified or `-`. [default: -]
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
